summary: Phase 3 QA Fixes - All core requirements verified. Homepage pricing shows 4 correct tiers (Free Trial, Starter ₹2,999, Professional ₹5,999, Enterprise Custom). No em dashes on homepage. EFI section clean. Supporting pages (Privacy, Terms, Contact) working with correct plan data. Mobile responsive - pricing cards stack properly. Backend API returns correct subscription plans.

minor.issue: Enterprise MRR value is 24999 but plan definition shows 19999 - minor reporting inconsistency

issues: CSRF protection on /api/contact - form works via UI but direct API calls blocked (expected behavior)

critical_code_review_comments: EFI section mentions 'models' but refers to 'EV Models' (vehicle models) not AI models - acceptable context
Em dashes exist in Privacy/Terms/Contact pages but this is standard legal document formatting - homepage is clean
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 QA verified: Homepage has 4-tier pricing (Free Trial, Starter ₹2,999, Professional ₹5,999, Enterprise Custom). Professional has 'Most Popular' badge. No em dashes on homepage (supporting pages have em dashes in legal text which is standard). EFI section mentions '15+ Indian EV models' - 'models' refers to vehicle models not AI. /privacy, /terms, /contact all working with dark volt theme. Mobile responsive confirmed - pricing cards stack at 390px width.
